mapper.sql: p.post_id, p.author_id, ap.nickname AS author_nickname, ap.avatar AS author_avatar, p.title, p.category, p.related_fund_id, fi.fund_code AS related_fund_code, fi.fund_name AS related_fund_name, p.summary, p.content, p.tags, p.view_count, p.comment_count, p.like_count, p.status, p.created_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM community_post p INNER JOIN community_author_profile ap ON ap.author_id = p.author_id LEFT JOIN fund_info fi ON fi.fund_id = p.related_fund_id
p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND p.category = #{category}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.author_id = #{authorId}
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.like_count DESC, p.post_id DESC
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.comment_count DESC, p.post_id DESC
ORDER BY p.created_time DESC, p.post_id DESC

SELECT
FROM community_post p INNER JOIN community_author_profile ap ON ap.author_id = p.author_id LEFT JOIN fund_info fi ON fi.fund_id = p.related_fund_id WHERE p.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY p.created_time DESC, p.post_id DESC

SELECT , CASE WHEN
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_like l WHERE l.target_type = 'POST' AND l.target_id = p.post_id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
1 = 0
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, CASE WHEN
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_post_view v WHERE v.post_id = p.post_id AND v.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
1 = 0
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS viewed FROM community_post p INNER JOIN community_author_profile ap ON ap.author_id = p.author_id LEFT JOIN fund_info fi ON fi.fund_id = p.related_fund_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, u.username, c.content, c.status, c.created_time FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN fund_user u ON u.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY c.created_time ASC, c.comment_id ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(post_id), 0) + 1 FROM community_post
INSERT INTO community_post ( post_id, author_id, title, category, related_fund_id, summary, content, tags, view_count, comment_count, like_count, status, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{category}, #{relatedFundId}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{tags}, 0, 0, 0, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO community_author_profile ( author_id, user_id, nickname, avatar, intro, article_count, follower_count, created_time, updated_time ) SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(author_id), 0) + 1 FROM community_author_profile), u.user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('研究用户', u.user_id)), u.avatar, '基金研究平台用户', 0, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM fund_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_author_profile ap WHERE ap.user_id = u.user_id )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_author_profile SET article_count = COALESCE(article_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE author_id = #{authorId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post_view (view_id, post_id, user_id, ip_address, user_agent, view_time) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(view_id), 0) + 1 FROM community_post_view), #{postId}, #{userId}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET view_count = COALESCE(view_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_like (like_id, user_id, target_type, target_id, created_time) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(like_id), 0) + 1 FROM community_like), #{userId}, 'POST', #{postId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET like_count = COALESCE(like_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE community_post SET like_count = CASE WHEN COALESCE(like_count, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(like_count, 0) - 1 ELSE 0 END, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(comment_id), 0) + 1 FROM community_comment
INSERT INTO community_comment (comment_id, post_id, user_id, content, status, created_time) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, 'PUBLISHED', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET comment_count = COALESCE(comment_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select:
SELECT ap.author_id, ap.user_id, ap.nickname, ap.avatar, ap.intro, ap.article_count, ap.follower_count, CASE WHEN
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_author_follow f WHERE f.author_id = ap.author_id AND f.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
1 = 0
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS followed FROM community_author_profile ap WHERE ap.author_id = #{authorId}

SELECT ap.author_id, ap.user_id, ap.nickname, ap.avatar, ap.intro, ap.article_count, ap.follower_count, CASE WHEN
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_author_follow f WHERE f.author_id = ap.author_id AND f.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
1 = 0
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS followed FROM community_author_profile ap
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_author_follow fx WHERE fx.author_id = ap.author_id AND fx.user_id = #{currentUserId} )
ORDER BY ap.follower_count DESC, ap.author_id ASC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ap.author_id, ap.user_id, ap.nickname, ap.avatar, ap.intro, ap.article_count, ap.follower_count, 1 AS followed FROM community_author_follow f INNER JOIN community_author_profile ap ON ap.author_id = f.author_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_time DESC, f.follow_id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT , 1 AS liked, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_post_view v WHERE v.post_id = p.post_id AND v.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS viewed FROM community_like l INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.post_id = l.target_id AND l.target_type = 'POST' INNER JOIN community_author_profile ap ON ap.author_id = p.author_id LEFT JOIN fund_info fi ON fi.fund_id = p.related_fund_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY l.created_time DESC, l.like_id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.comment_id AS "commentId", c.post_id AS "postId", c.user_id AS "userId", c.content AS "content", c.created_time AS "createdTime", p.title AS "postTitle", p.category AS "category", p.related_fund_id AS "relatedFundId", fi.fund_code AS "relatedFundCode", fi.fund_name AS "relatedFundName" FROM community_comment c INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.post_id = c.post_id LEFT JOIN fund_info fi ON fi.fund_id = p.related_fund_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY c.created_time DESC, c.comment_id DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_author_follow (follow_id, user_id, author_id, created_time) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(follow_id), 0) + 1 FROM community_author_follow), #{userId}, #{authorId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_author_profile SET follower_count = COALESCE(follower_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE author_id = #{authorId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM community_post WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY category
